page_metadata.biotools__summary: Suite of applications for building and manipulating the Burrows-Wheeler Transform (BWT) of collections of DNA sequences. The algorithms employed are intended to scale to collections of sequences containing one billion entries or more.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Suite of applications for building and manipulating the Burrows-Wheeler Transform (BWT) of collections of DNA sequences. The algorithms employed are intended to scale to collections of sequences containing one billion entries or more.
